title: IR: Click the Strong C-O Stretch
bodyText: The spectrum is from an oxygen-containing organic liquid. Click the deepest C-O stretching absorption near $1245\ cm^{-1}$.

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this would show the full IR spectrum with a strong fingerprint-region C-O absorption and weaker alkyl C-H stretches.

feedbacks: Correct: the strongest C-O stretch is centered around 1245 cm^-1.
Not quite. Look for the deepest absorption in the fingerprint region around 1200-1300 cm^-1.
